name: 17pc BBQ Stainless Steel Grill Spatula Set Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Prepare your favorite grilled food by using the 17-Piece BBQ Stainless Steel Grill Spatula Set from Room Essentials™. This spatula set includes tongs, skewers and more, along with a temperature monitor to meet all your grilling needs. Made of stainless steel, the pieces are designed with a plastic handle for convenient holding. Plus, they're packed in a black carry bag with a handle for storage and transportation.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
